Mase Consulting Group

URL: https://maseconsultinggroup.com/
Summary: Boutique advisory firm focused on technology strategy, digital transformation, data and AI, cyber resilience, and operating model change.

Primary services:
- Technology and digital transformation advisory
- Data and AI strategy and delivery
- Cloud, platforms, and enterprise solutions
- Cyber security and digital risk
- Operating model, people, and change

Audience:
- Senior leaders
- CIOs and CTOs
- Transformation and delivery leaders

Contact:
- Email: info@maseconsultinggroup.com
